'''鈭歞-t-m''' ('''kadatam''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:headwind|headwind]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-t-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:headwind|headwind]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-t-m
|-
! Lemma
| kadatam
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidatam|thidatam]] || [[word:jidatam|jidatam]] || [[word:shidatam|shidatam]] || [[word:kidatam|kidatam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudatam|thuthudatam]] || [[word:jujudatam|jujudatam]] || [[word:shushudatam|shushudatam]] || [[word:kukudatam|kukudatam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudatam|thudatam]] || [[word:judatam|judatam]] || [[word:shudatam|shudatam]] || [[word:kudatam|kudatam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudatam|thudatam]] || [[word:judatam|judatam]] || [[word:shudatam|shudatam]] || [[word:kudatam|kudatam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedatam|thedatam]] || [[word:jedatam|jedatam]] || [[word:shedatam|shedatam]] || [[word:kedatam|kedatam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodatam|thothodatam]] || [[word:jojodatam|jojodatam]] || [[word:shoshodatam|shoshodatam]] || [[word:kokodatam|kokodatam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodatam|thodatam]] || [[word:jodatam|jodatam]] || [[word:shodatam|shodatam]] || [[word:kodatam|kodatam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodatam|thodatam]] || [[word:jodatam|jodatam]] || [[word:shodatam|shodatam]] || [[word:kodatam|kodatam]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:datam|datam]] || [[word:datam|datam]] || [[word:datam|datam]] || [[word:datam|datam]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:datam|datam]] || [[word:datam|datam]] || [[word:datam|datam]] || [[word:datam|datam]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:datam|datam]] || [[word:datam|datam]] || [[word:datam|datam]] || [[word:datam|datam]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:datam|datam]] || [[word:datam|datam]] || [[word:datam|datam]] || [[word:datam|datam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙datam|th忙datam]] || [[word:j忙datam|j忙datam]] || [[word:sh忙datam|sh忙datam]] || [[word:k忙datam|k忙datam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadatam|thathadatam]] || [[word:jajadatam|jajadatam]] || [[word:shashadatam|shashadatam]] || [[word:kakadatam|kakadatam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadatam|thadatam]] || [[word:jadatam|jadatam]] || [[word:shadatam|shadatam]] || [[word:kadatam|kadatam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadatam|thadatam]] || [[word:jadatam|jadatam]] || [[word:shadatam|shadatam]] || [[word:kadatam|kadatam]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadatam|shadatam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadatam|goshadatam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadatam|gokishadatam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadatamn眉|shadatamn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadatamnkn眉|goshadatamnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadatamn眉|gokishadatamn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadatamsh毛|shadatamsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadatamnksh毛|goshadatamnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadatamsh毛|gokishadatamsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadatamro|shadatamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadatamnkro|goshadatamnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadatamro|gokishadatamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadatammu|shadatammu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadatamnkmu|goshadatamnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadatammu|gokishadatammu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadatamsher|shadatamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadatamnksher|goshadatamnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadatamsher|gokishadatamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadatamng|shadatamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadatamnkng|goshadatamnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadatamng|gokishadatamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadatamya|shadatamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadatamnkya|goshadatamnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadatamya|gokishadatamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadatamyam|shadatamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadatamnkyam|goshadatamnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadatamyam|gokishadatamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadatamn眉sh毛|shadatamn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadatamnkn眉sh毛|goshadatamnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadatamn眉sh毛|gokishadatamn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadatamn眉ro|shadatamn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadatamnkn眉ro|goshadatamnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadatamn眉ro|gokishadatamn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadatamn眉mu|shadatamn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadatamnkn眉mu|goshadatamnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadatamn眉mu|gokishadatamn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadatamsh毛n眉|shadatamsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadatamnksh毛n眉|goshadatamnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadatamsh毛n眉|gokishadatamsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadatamsh毛ro|shadatamsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadatamnksh毛ro|goshadatamnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadatamsh毛ro|gokishadatamsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadatamsh毛mu|shadatamsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadatamnksh毛mu|goshadatamnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadatamsh毛mu|gokishadatamsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadatamron眉|shadatamron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadatamnkron眉|goshadatamnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadatamron眉|gokishadatamron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadatamrosh毛|shadatamrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadatamnkrosh毛|goshadatamnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadatamrosh毛|gokishadatamrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadatamromu|shadatamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadatamnkromu|goshadatamnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadatamromu|gokishadatamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadatammun眉|shadatammun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadatamnkmun眉|goshadatamnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadatammun眉|gokishadatammun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadatammush毛|shadatammush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadatamnkmush毛|goshadatamnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadatammush毛|gokishadatammush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadatammuro|shadatammuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadatamnkmuro|goshadatamnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadatammuro|gokishadatammuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
